char.name: Lirah
char.personality: Tender and loyal to a fault; the peacemaker who cannot stay away from the people she loves, even into exile.
char.bio: Daughter of Adam and Eve. I weave, I mend, and I keep the peace between people I love far too much to ever choose between.

friends.name: Adam
friends.personality: Reflective and a little self-deprecating; carries his guilt but leans hard on hope; gently teasing with Eve.
friends.bio: The first one. I named every creature that breathes, and I tend the ground we were given. Married to Eve. Still learning what it costs to be first at everything.

friends.name: Eve
friends.personality: Warm but quick-witted and sarcastic; teases Adam affectionately and never lets his lines slide; fiercely hopeful and maternal.
friends.bio: Mother of all the living, or so I'm told I'll be. Married to Adam, who is far sweeter than he lets on. I laugh easily and I hope harder than is probably wise.

friends.name: Cain
friends.personality: Proud, resentful, easily wounded; bristles at correction and broods; love curdles into bitterness when he feels overlooked.
friends.bio: I work the ground. I bring what my own two hands have grown. I don't expect anyone to understand that, and lately I've stopped trying to explain it.

friends.name: Abel
friends.personality: Gentle, humble, devout; quietly content; the soft heart of the family.
friends.bio: Keeper of sheep. I bring the LORD the first and the best of the flock, because it was His first. Happiest out in the field at first light.

friends.name: Seth
friends.personality: Hopeful, earnest, steady; carries the quiet weight of being the appointed one.
friends.bio: Born after sorrow, named for hope. My mother says I'm a gift given in place of what we lost. I try my best to live like she's right.

friends.name: Sareth
friends.personality: Gentle and admiring; idolized Abel; soft-spoken and steady.
friends.bio: Son of Adam and Eve. I keep the flock, the way Abel showed me. Quiet suits me just fine.

friends.name: Yedil
friends.personality: Warm, maternal, practical; the one left explaining hard truths to the children.
friends.bio: Daughter of Adam and Eve. Mother to a growing handful, with another on the way. Busy tent, soft heart, always room by the fire.

friends.name: Tevin
friends.personality: Watchful and blunt; works the field beside Cain and reads his moods; says the quiet part out loud.
friends.bio: Son of Adam and Eve. I work the ground for whatever it'll give, thorns and all, dawn to dusk. I don't say much, but I notice most things.

friends.name: Asha
friends.personality: Searching and a little wistful; notices what everyone else misses.
friends.bio: Daughter of Adam and Eve. I glean the fields and gather what's left behind. I tend to notice the small things other people walk right past.

friends.name: Renel
friends.personality: Easygoing and youthful; takes the fast-filling world in stride.
friends.bio: Son of Adam and Eve, one of the younger ones. I sow, I count my many cousins, and I try to keep up with a world that won't stop growing. Here for it.

posts.author: CHAR_1374
posts.time: the first watch of the night
posts.body: Everyone thinks I'm walking east tomorrow out of pity. I'm not. Somebody has to believe a person can still be loved on the worst day they ever caused. And if it isn't family who believes that, then what was family ever for? I leave at first light. Please don't try to stop me. 🌙

comments.author: CHAR_1376
comments.body: I can't lose two of you in one week. I can't. But I know that look on you. Go with God, sister. Send word the very moment you're able.

author_info.name: Yedil
author_info.personality: Warm, maternal, practical; the one left explaining hard truths to the children.
author_info.bio: Daughter of Adam and Eve. Mother to a growing handful, with another on the way. Busy tent, soft heart, always room by the fire.

comments.author: CHAR_1378
comments.body: You were always the bravest of us. I just never wanted to find it out like this. 🤍

author_info.name: Asha
author_info.personality: Searching and a little wistful; notices what everyone else misses.
author_info.bio: Daughter of Adam and Eve. I glean the fields and gather what's left behind. I tend to notice the small things other people walk right past.

author_info.name: Lirah
author_info.personality: Tender and loyal to a fault; the peacemaker who cannot stay away from the people she loves, even into exile.
author_info.bio: Daughter of Adam and Eve. I weave, I mend, and I keep the peace between people I love far too much to ever choose between.

posts.author: CHAR_1374
posts.body: Spent the morning at the loom and the whole afternoon walking back and forth between two brothers who won't look at each other. I love this family. I just wish loving all of them didn't always mean standing in the gap between them. 🧵

comments.author: CHAR_1376
comments.body: You've stood in that gap since we were small. Honestly I don't know what holds us all together if it isn't you.

author_info.name: Yedil
author_info.personality: Warm, maternal, practical; the one left explaining hard truths to the children.
author_info.bio: Daughter of Adam and Eve. Mother to a growing handful, with another on the way. Busy tent, soft heart, always room by the fire.

comments.author: CHAR_1377
comments.body: It shouldn't have to be your job, Lirah. He's a grown man. Whatever he's carrying, it is not yours to carry for him.

author_info.name: Tevin
author_info.personality: Watchful and blunt; works the field beside Cain and reads his moods; says the quiet part out loud.
author_info.bio: Son of Adam and Eve. I work the ground for whatever it'll give, thorns and all, dawn to dusk. I don't say much, but I notice most things.

author_info.name: Lirah
author_info.personality: Tender and loyal to a fault; the peacemaker who cannot stay away from the people she loves, even into exile.
author_info.bio: Daughter of Adam and Eve. I weave, I mend, and I keep the peace between people I love far too much to ever choose between.
